options.label: I lost my Voter ID Card (EPIC)
My name is not on the Voter List
I moved to a new address

lost_id.question: Do you have any other official photo ID?

options.label: No, I don't have any other ID

terminal.title: You can still vote!
steps: Check the Document Checklist for the 12 accepted alternate IDs.
Carry any ONE of those IDs (e.g., Aadhaar, Passport, PAN) to your booth.
The Election Commission allows these even if you don't have your EPIC card.

terminal.title: Download your digital Voter ID
steps: Go to the ECI Voter Portal.
Login and download your e-EPIC (digital Voter ID).
Print the e-EPIC and carry it to the booth with a photo slip.
If you can't download it, contact your ERO (Electoral Registration Officer).

missing_name.question: Have you searched on the National Voter Search portal?

options.label: Yes, but couldn't find my name

terminal.title: Check the Electoral Roll
steps: Visit the Electoral Search portal.
Search by Details or by EPIC Number.
If found, note your Part Number and Serial Number.
If not found, proceed to register immediately.

terminal.title: Register as a New Voter
steps: If your name is missing, you must fill Form 6.
The deadline is usually 2-3 weeks before the election.
You can register online via the NVSP portal.
Keep your age and residence proof ready.

terminal.title: Update your Address (Form 8)
steps: Login to the Voter Portal.
Fill Form 8 for 'Shifting of Residence'.
Provide proof of your new address.
Your name will be shifted to the new polling booth.

terminal.title: Welcome, Future Voter!
steps: Check if you are 18+ years old.
Register online using Form 6.
Wait for your EPIC card to arrive or download e-EPIC.
Practice using the EVM Simulator on this app!
